raw_consumer_statement:
Under CFPB Case No. XXXX, Barclays issued a written response dated XX/XX/year> stating that my dispute claim was accepted and that credits totaling {$1000.00} had been issued to my account and would appear on my XX/XX/year> billing statement. 

As of today ( XX/XX/year> ), the credit has not been applied. The {$1000.00} amount remains on my account and continues to accrue interest. I have continued making minimum payments to avoid negative reporting. 

On XX/XX/year>, I spoke with XXXX from the Barclays XXXX of the XXXX. She stated the credit should have already posted and promised to investigate and follow up. No follow-up has been provided and no credit has been applied. 

This complaint concerns Barclays failure to execute its confirmed resolution and failure to provide written clarification despite my request.
